body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/bind 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/bind 
 ## 接口描述 
回单文件绑定接口，传入文件唯一编号，可结合回单文件上传接口使用。
支持传入billId+payIndex 或者 只传 oboSeqId，作为明细的匹配值,
billId+payIndex 和 oboSeqId 都传时，明细匹配值要保持一致。
最多支持传入100条回单文件key。
多次调用绑定接口，回单文件绑定为累加，原有绑定的回单文件有效。
回单文件绑定时，无效文件key会自动清除，只保留有效文件key。
支付明细已绑定的文件key再次进行绑定不进行重复绑定。
 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025031804139","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5billId%2BpayIndex%20%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%20%E5%8F%AA%E4%BC%A0%20oboSeqId%EF%BC%8C%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E5%80%BC","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"payIndex","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5billId%2BpayIndex%20%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%20%E5%8F%AA%E4%BC%A0%20oboSeqId%EF%BC%8C%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"oboSeqId","label":"%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1270","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5billId%2BpayIndex%20%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%20%E5%8F%AA%E4%BC%A0%20oboSeqId%EF%BC%8C%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"receiptList","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6Key%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%20%5B%20%22903e38be-01c7-4419-992d-18092db585b0%22%20%5D","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5100%E6%9D%A1%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6key","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%9C%AA%E6%89%BE%E5%88%B0%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%B7%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E5%90%8E%E9%87%8D%E8%AF%95"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "billId": 2025011100018011,
    "payIndex": "1",
    "oboSeqId": 1,
    "receiptList": [
        "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9",
        "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f47517"
    ]
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage": ""
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | 400 | 未找到对应的支付信息，请确认后重试 |  |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/bind

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/bind

接口描述

回单文件绑定接口，传入文件唯一编号，可结合回单文件上传接口使用。 支持传入billId+payIndex 或者 只传 oboSeqId，作为明细的匹配值, billId+payIndex 和 oboSeqId 都传时，明细匹配值要保持一致。 最多支持传入100条回单文件key。 多次调用绑定接口，回单文件绑定为累加，原有绑定的回单文件有效。 回单文件绑定时，无效文件key会自动清除，只保留有效文件key。 支付明细已绑定的文件key再次进行绑定不进行重复绑定。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"billId","label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2025031804139","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5billId%2BpayIndex%20%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%20%E5%8F%AA%E4%BC%A0%20oboSeqId%EF%BC%8C%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E5%80%BC","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"payIndex","label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5billId%2BpayIndex%20%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%20%E5%8F%AA%E4%BC%A0%20oboSeqId%EF%BC%8C%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"oboSeqId","label":"%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"1270","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5billId%2BpayIndex%20%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%20%E5%8F%AA%E4%BC%A0%20oboSeqId%EF%BC%8C%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%98%8E%E7%BB%86%E7%9A%84%E5%8C%B9%E9%85%8D%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"receiptList","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6Key%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%20%5B%20%22903e38be-01c7-4419-992d-18092db585b0%22%20%5D","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5100%E6%9D%A1%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6key","required":true}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%9C%AA%E6%89%BE%E5%88%B0%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%9A%84%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%B7%E7%A1%AE%E8%AE%A4%E5%90%8E%E9%87%8D%E8%AF%95"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
    "billId": 2025011100018011,
    "payIndex": "1",
    "oboSeqId": 1,
    "receiptList": [
        "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f475c9",
        "c35397d6-5234-4fb2-b874-625951f47517"
    ]
}

响应报文

{
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage": ""
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
400 未找到对应的支付信息，请确认后重试
